info.name: US Government Open Data API

item.name: Discovery

request.description:
Returns metadata for all public data products your API key has access to. Each product entry includes product_id, display_name, category, country, record_count, and last_refreshed_at.

Available product IDs include:
- us_permits_nyc, us_permits_austin, us_permits_sf, us_permits_chicago, us_permits_seattle, us_permits_nj, us_permits_honolulu, us_permits_cincinnati
- us_business_ny, us_business_ca, us_business_fl, us_business_ak, us_business_co, us_business_ct, us_business_ia, us_business_or, us_business_pa
- us_irs_nonprofits, us_sec_edgar, us_ofac_sanctions, us_federal_procurement, us_naics_codes

Returns full metadata and field schema for a specific data product. Includes the list of searchable fields, filterable fields, data freshness, and record count.

Set the `product_id` collection variable to one of the available product IDs before sending.

Returns the output schema for a data product — the complete list of fields returned by the search and export endpoints, including each field's type and description.

Use this endpoint to understand what data you'll receive before building an integration.

Returns all public product groups. A product group is a named collection of related data products that can be searched together in a single cross-product query.

Available group IDs:
- us_building_permits — 8 city/state permit datasets (8.8M+ records)
- us_business_registry — 9 state business entity registries + IRS nonprofits + SEC EDGAR
- compliance_screening — OFAC sanctions list

Returns metadata for a specific product group, including the list of member product IDs.

Set the `group_id` collection variable to one of: us_building_permits, us_business_registry, compliance_screening.

item.description: Endpoints for exploring available data products and product groups.

item.name: Building Permits

query.description: Full-text search across address, contractor name, and job description
Filter by standardized permit type: roofing | hvac | electrical | plumbing | solar | new_construction | renovation | demolition | mechanical | fire_protection | other
Filter by status: issued | pending | expired | revoked | completed | cancelled
Number of results to return (1-200, default 50)

request.description:
Search NYC building permits for issued HVAC jobs. NYC permit data covers 917K+ records sourced from NYC Open Data (data.cityofnewyork.us).

The `q` parameter searches across address, contractor name, and job description. Use `permit_type` and `status` as exact-match filters.

query.description: Filter to records created or updated on/after this date (ISO 8601)

request.description: Find solar installation permits filed in NYC since January 2024. Useful for identifying contractors active in the solar market and properties that have recently gone solar.
Search Austin, TX building permits for roofing jobs. Austin permit data is sourced from the City of Austin Open Data portal via Socrata.
Search San Francisco building permits for electrical work. SF permit data is sourced from DataSF (data.sfgov.org) via the Socrata API.

query.description: Search term applied across all 8 permit datasets simultaneously
Max results to return across all products combined

request.description:
Search across all 8 building permit datasets simultaneously — NYC, Austin, SF, Chicago, Seattle, NJ, Honolulu, and Cincinnati — in a single request. Results are merged and returned with a source_products breakdown.

Use this when you want national-level lead generation without querying each city individually.

item.description:
Search building permit records across 8 US cities and states. Over 8.8M records sourced from official Socrata Open Data portals.

Supported permit types: roofing, hvac, electrical, plumbing, solar, new_construction, renovation, demolition, mechanical, fire_protection, other
Supported statuses: issued, pending, expired, revoked, completed, cancelled

item.name: Business Registry / KYB

request.description:
Search New York State active corporations by business name. Dataset covers all active domestic and foreign corporations filed since 1800, sourced from the NY DOS via data.ny.gov.

Returns: entity name, entity type, DOS filing date, address, county.

Search California Secretary of State business entities. Returns active and inactive corporations, LLCs, and other registered entities.

Use this for lead generation targeting California-registered businesses or KYB verification of CA entities.

item.name: IRS Nonprofits — Search by Organization Name

request.description:
Search IRS Exempt Organizations Business Master File (EO BMF) — all ~1.9 million US nonprofits, tax-exempt organizations, and charities recognized under IRC Section 501(c).

Returns: EIN, organization name, IRC exemption type (501(c)(3) etc.), exemption ruling date, address, NTEE code.

Updated monthly from the IRS.
Find active 501(c)(3) charitable organizations matching a keyword. The subsection_code filter maps to IRS subsection codes: 03 = 501(c)(3), 06 = 501(c)(6) trade associations, etc.

query.description: Search by company name or ticker

request.description:
Search SEC EDGAR annual filings (10-K) for public US companies. Results are powered by the EDGAR full-text search index.

Returns: accession number, company name (with ticker and CIK), form type, filing date, fiscal year end, state, SIC code.

Note: EDGAR returns up to 100 results per page regardless of the limit parameter — this is an EDGAR API constraint.

query.description: Search across all business registry products simultaneously
Max results across all products combined

request.description:
Search all business registry products simultaneously — NY, CA, FL, AK, CO, CT, IA, OR, PA state registries plus IRS nonprofits and SEC EDGAR. Returns merged results with source_products breakdown.

Useful for KYB due diligence when you need to check an entity across multiple jurisdictions in one call.

item.description: Search US business entity registrations for KYB (Know Your Business) due diligence, lead generation, and market research. Covers 9 state business registries, IRS nonprofit data (~1.9M records), and SEC EDGAR annual filings.

item.name: Compliance

query.description: Name to screen against the SDN list

request.description:
Screen an individual or entity name against the OFAC Specially Designated Nationals (SDN) and Blocked Persons List — the US Treasury's primary sanctions database.

Covers ~9,000+ individuals, entities, vessels, and aircraft subject to US economic sanctions. Updated weekly from the US Treasury.

Returns: entity name, entity type (individual | entity | vessel | aircraft), sanctions program (e.g. RUSSIA-EO14024, IRAN, CUBA, SDGT), country, and OFAC remarks containing DOB, aliases, and passport numbers.

item.name: OFAC — Filter by Program and Entity Type

query.description: Filter by type: individual | entity | vessel | aircraft
Filter by sanctions program code (e.g. RUSSIA-EO14024, IRAN, CUBA, SDGT)

request.description:
List sanctioned entities under a specific OFAC program. This example returns Russian entities sanctioned under Executive Order 14024 (Blocking Property With Respect To Specified Harmful Foreign Activities of the Government of the Russian Federation).

Common program codes: RUSSIA-EO14024, IRAN, CUBA, SDGT (terrorism), DPRK (North Korea), GLOMAG (Global Magnitsky).

query.description: Filter by country of origin or nationality

request.description: List OFAC-sanctioned individuals and entities associated with a specific country.

query.description: Search across title, agency, description, and awardee name
Filter by NAICS industry code (541511 = custom computer programming)

request.description:
Search federal contract opportunities and awards from SAM.gov. Returns solicitations, awards, and contract modifications across all NAICS codes. Updated every 6 hours.

Returns: title, federal agency, solicitation number, NAICS code, set-aside type, posted date, response deadline, award amount, awardee name, place of performance.

item.description: Compliance and sanctions screening endpoints. Check entities against the OFAC SDN list and search SEC federal procurement data.

item.name: Export

query.description: Full-text search filter applied to export

request.description:
Export NYC solar building permits as a downloadable CSV file. The response is a streaming download with Content-Disposition: attachment headers.

Export supports the same filter_fields as the search endpoint. Maximum 10,000 records per export request.

Note: Export must be enabled on your API key. Contact support to enable this feature.

query.description: Filter to individual persons on the SDN list

request.description:
Export OFAC SDN individual records as a streaming JSON download. Useful for bulk compliance screening pipelines.

The response streams newline-delimited JSON records for easy parsing in any language.

item.name: Export NY Business Registry as CSV

query.description: Only businesses registered on or after this date

request.description:
Export NY business entities matching 'consulting' that were registered since 2020. Useful for building targeted B2B outreach lists.

The since parameter filters by the record's issue_date field (DOS filing date for NY entities).

query.description: Number of records to export (up to 10,000)

request.description:
Export active environmental nonprofits from the IRS EO BMF as a CSV. With ~1.9M records in the database, this is well-suited for bulk export and analysis.

Each row includes EIN, organization name, IRC subsection, ruling date, address, and NTEE code.

item.description: Export product data as streaming CSV or JSON downloads. Export supports the same filters as the search endpoint. Maximum 10,000 records per export. Requires export_enabled permission on your API key.

item.name: Health

request.description:
Check the API health status. Returns the status of all components: database, Redis cache, and upstream data sources.

Overall status values:
- healthy: All components up
- degraded: Some upstream sources in cooldown but service is functional
- unhealthy: Critical components (database) are down

No API key required for this endpoint.

item.description: Health check endpoint. No authentication required.

variable.description: Your API key. Get one at https://sip.myskillstore.dev
